payload.summary: A/B/C three test groups all passed. The three-file refine product design (raw/clean/summary) meets expectations. auto fallback verified when Ollama unreachable.

environment.server: http://192.168.0.122:8000 (version 0.1.5, model small, llm workers 1/1, llm queue 0/16)

A_full_pipeline.input_file: E:\projects\my_app\temp\三分钟学会选短线个股.mp4

products._raw.txt: 6983 bytes (raw ASR, traditional Chinese + ASR errors)
products._clean.txt: 7137 bytes (corrected + simplified, preserves order, no reorg)

server.mode: server (server relay, LLM queue concurrent=1, serial)
server.server_side_note: lclaude should see 2 llm jobs (correct + structure) in tail logs

auto_fallback.command: vtext_client --refine-only C_auto/sample.txt --refine-mode auto --ollama http://192.168.5.1:9 (intentionally unreachable) --server http://192.168.0.122:8000
auto_fallback.mode: auto, Ollama unreachable -> fallback to server relay
auto_fallback.fallback_note: Ollama 192.168.5.1:9 is unreachable, so direct connect must fail. Successful output proves the auto mode successfully fell back to server relay. Both LLM calls (correct + structure) succeeded via server.
auto_fallback.server_side_note: lclaude should see 2 llm jobs (correct + structure) coming from C_auto fallback

core_corrections_all_5_cleans_correct: 傳小好掉頭 → 船小好掉头
other_corrections_all_5_correct: 護身兩式 → 沪深两市
郵高到低 → 由高到低
quality_samples.simplified_consistency: A / B / C_auto all fully simplified. C_direct / C_server have minor residual 著 (4-6 occurrences 意味著 should be 意味着).
quality_samples.summary_structure: 5 main sections: 课程背景与核心理念 / 股性与涨停基因 (涨停基因复制法) / 具体选股步骤 (涨幅榜初筛 + 三维条件 [趋势/均线/成交量] + 量比 + 换手率) / 最终确认与交易纪律 / 课程预告. Heading levels #/##/### clear.
quality_samples.summary_data_fidelity: All key numbers preserved: 4000+ companies, 3800→4800 points, 26%, 4%, 6%, >=8%, 60-day MA, volume ratio 2-5/5-10, turnover 3%-10%, <=10 stocks. No fabricated content.
quality_samples.raw_preservation: clean strictly preserves raw paragraph order, no reorg/deletion. summary structured from clean.
quality_samples.three_file_design_value: Three-stage pipeline clear for fault isolation: raw bad = ASR issue; clean bad but raw OK = correction issue; summary bad but clean OK = structuring issue.

md5_all_distinct.note: A and C_auto have same byte count (7137) by coincidence. MD5 differs -> content differs (temperature 0.4 non-determinism). All 5 cleans are distinct, no prompt cache anomaly.

issues_observed.issue: 主力 vs 阻力 homophone mishearing not corrected in clean stage
examples: raw 阻力在股价连续放量上涨之后 should be 主力在股价连续放量上涨之后
raw 中长期的阻力去运作 should be 中长期的**主力**去运作
issues_observed.frequency_across_5_cleans: 4 of 5 cleans (A, C_direct, C_server, C_auto) keep BOTH 阻力 errors. Only B correctly fixed the 2nd one (中长期的阻力 -> 主力). This is the most stable correction miss.
issues_observed.suggestion: Add explicit homophone contrast list (主力/阻力/助力/...) to correct_text system prompt, or add a post-correction sanity pass.

issues_observed.issue: C_direct / C_server clean has minor residual traditional 著 (should be 着)
issues_observed.frequency: minor, 4-6 occurrences 意味著 should be 意味着
issues_observed.note: A / B / C_auto have all been unified. C_direct / C_server have a few leftovers, likely random LLM output variance.

payload.warnings_or_errors: No refine warnings. 4 refine-only all exit 0. Full pipeline A exit 0. Server side /llm/chat relay called 4 times in C_server (2 jobs) + C_auto fallback (2 jobs), serial via LLM queue (concurrent=1).
payload.auto_fallback_verification: PASS. --refine-mode auto + --ollama http://192.168.5.1:9 (unreachable) + --server http://192.168.0.122:8000 successfully produced sample_clean (7137B) and sample_summary (5211B). Direct Ollama must fail, so success proves server relay fallback works.
payload.overall_conclusion: The three-file refine product design fully meets expectations. Three-stage pipeline is clearly isolatable (raw ASR / clean corrected+simplified full text / summary structured markdown). Correction and simplification quality is high (4 core correction examples + 8 common corrections all correct in 5 cleans). Strict order preservation. Summary data integrity 100%, no fabrication. Refine on by default is user-friendly, failure warn-and-skip does not break transcription. Three modes (direct/server/auto) all work, auto fallback reliable. One improvement point: clean stage homophone mishearing correction rate (currently 1/10, B 1/2 is best), recommend adding homophone contrast list in prompt.
